strategies.name: SMA 80
strategies.entry: Buy when price crosses above SMA 80
strategies.exit: Sell when price crosses below SMA 80

strategies.name: EMA 80
strategies.entry: Buy when price crosses above EMA 80
strategies.exit: Sell when price crosses below EMA 80

strategies.name: SMA 5
strategies.entry: Buy when price crosses above SMA 5
strategies.exit: Sell when price crosses below SMA 5

strategies.name: SMA 30
strategies.entry: Buy when price crosses above SMA 30
strategies.exit: Sell when price crosses below SMA 30

strategies.name: MACD 26-12-9
strategies.entry: Buy when MACD line crosses above signal line while both are below the zero line
strategies.exit: Sell when MACD line crosses below signal line

strategies.name: RSI 14
strategies.entry: Buy only when RSI crosses above 30 from below (oversold recovery)
strategies.exit: Sell when RSI reaches overbought zone (above 70) or reverses

strategies.name: Support and Resistance
strategies.entry: Buy at support levels with confirmation; sell short at resistance levels
strategies.exit: Exit at next resistance (long) or next support (short), or at stop loss

strategies.name: Bollinger Bands 20-2
strategies.entry: Buy when price touches or breaks below the lower band and reverses
strategies.exit: Sell when price reaches the middle band (SMA 20) or upper band

strategies.name: Dow Theory
strategies.entry: Buy when index confirms primary uptrend: higher highs and higher lows on weekly chart
strategies.exit: Sell when index breaks primary uptrend with lower lows

strategies.name: Bullish Engulfing
strategies.pattern_description: 5-candle context: downtrend of 3-4 red candles followed by a large green candle that fully engulfs the previous red candle's body
strategies.entry: Buy at close of the engulfing green candle
strategies.exit: Sell after 5 days or at target/stop loss

strategies.name: Bullish Harami
strategies.pattern_description: Large red candle followed by a small green candle whose body is contained within the prior red candle's body
strategies.entry: Buy only when confirmed by at least one of: MACD crossover, price above MA, RSI turning up from oversold
strategies.exit: Sell after 5 days or at target/stop loss

strategies.name: Morning Star
strategies.pattern_description: 6-candle context: downtrend of 3 candles, then a large red candle, a small-bodied doji/spinning top (gap down), and a large green candle closing above midpoint of the first red candle
strategies.entry: Buy at close of the third (green) candle
strategies.exit: Sell after 5 days or at target/stop loss

strategies.name: Piercing Pattern
strategies.pattern_description: In a downtrend: a large red candle followed by a green candle that opens below the red candle's low and closes above the midpoint of the red candle's body
strategies.entry: Buy at close of the green candle
strategies.exit: Sell after 5 days or at target/stop loss

strategies.name: Death Cross
strategies.entry: Sell / exit long positions when 50 DMA crosses below 200 DMA

strategies.name: Golden Cross
strategies.entry: Buy when 50 DMA crosses above 200 DMA
